problem.title: Reverse Vowels of a String
problem.description: Given a string s, reverse only all the vowels in the string and return it.

example.explanation: Vowels in 'hello' are e(1) and o(4). Swap them: 'holle'. Two pointers from each end.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Two Pointers [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use two pointers starting at opposite ends of the string, advancing each inward until both land on vowels, then swap them. Only vowel characters are exchanged while non-vowel characters stay in place, so one pass is sufficient.
